name: Survio Online Survey API
what_it_does: Online survey creation and management platform with REST API — enabling marketers, researchers, and businesses to create surveys, collect responses, and analyze data programmatically, with support for multiple question types, response export, and integration with business tools via REST API and webhooks.
use_cases: Creating surveys programmatically via Survio API for automated survey deployment
Retrieving survey responses via Survio API for real-time analytics integration
Managing survey campaigns via Survio API for marketing research automation
Exporting response data via Survio API for data warehouse and BI tool integration
Triggering surveys via Survio API at customer journey milestones for contextual feedback
not_for: Enterprise customer experience management (use Qualtrics or Medallia for enterprise CX)
NPS/CSAT in-app surveys with behavioral triggers (use Delighted or Survicate for in-app)
Advanced research with complex branching and logic (use SurveyMonkey or Qualtrics)
best_when: A small to medium business needs a simple, affordable survey tool with REST API for programmatic survey management — particularly in European markets where the Czech company provides GDPR compliance.
avoid_when: You need enterprise CX management, complex branching logic, or advanced analytics.

auth.notes: Private API key in Authorization: Bearer header. API key from Survio account developer settings. No OAuth2. Webhooks for response submission events. REST API at api.survio.com/v1/. Simple bearer token authentication. No fine-grained scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 5 surveys, 100 responses/month, basic question types
pricing.paid_tiers: Mini €12/month (500 responses); Standard €33/month (1,000 responses + API); Business €66/month (unlimited responses); Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Czech Republic company (Brno). Founded 2012. 2M+ users. 50+ languages. GDPR compliant (Czech/EU company). API access from Standard plan (€33/month). Simple drag-and-drop survey builder. Question types: single/multiple choice, rating scales, NPS, open text, matrix. Response filtering and analytics. Export: CSV, XLS, PDF. Integrations: Zapier, Mailchimp, Google Sheets. White-label option on Enterprise plan. Mobile responsive surveys. QR code surveys. European market focus.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Bearer token. Webhooks. GDPR. Czech company. API from Standard plan (€33/month). Free tier limited (100 responses). 50+ languages. Simple REST API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Survey reads idempotent by survey ID. Response reads idempotent. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers. Survey creation not idempotent — check for duplicates.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires Standard plan (€33/month) or higher — free plan does not include API
Czech company — GDPR by default; EU data residency
Webhook events for response submissions — implement idempotent handlers
Free tier: 100 responses/month and 5 surveys — very limited for testing
Documentation limited — primarily Czech/EU focused community
Response export via API — use for BI/analytics integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth. GDPR compliant (Czech company). EU data residency by default. Survey response data (PII) protected under GDPR. No OAuth2 scope granularity. Webhook delivery — implement signature validation if available. Czech company with strong EU data protection culture.
